name: tb-impl
description: TB implementation: read DUT → gen TC skeleton → write TB → sim loop

tasks.detail: Read <module>.sv AND <module>_spec.md. List all: ports (name/width), functional scenarios, edge cases, reset values. Do not write code yet.

tasks.content: Generate test case list and tc_<module>.sv skeleton
tasks.detail: Use /gen-tc <module>. Then fill in: tc_reset (verify reset values), tc_normal_op (basic function), tc_boundary (min/max), plus 2+ edge cases from spec. Each task uses pass_cnt/fail_cnt refs.
Include: `include tc_<module>.sv, DUT instantiation, clock (always #5 clk=~clk), reset sequence, call all tc_ tasks in order, print final pass/fail count, $finish.
Run /sim tb_<module>.sv. If fail: check [FAIL] lines, diagnose DUT vs TB bug. Fix TB bugs here; DUT bugs → [MAS ESCALATE] rtl_gen.
Run /coverage <module>. Add tc_ tasks for any uncovered branches. Re-run sim if new TCs added.
